description: A customer calls to inform the company that they have moved and need to update their billing address.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the correct customer account.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the caller's identity to ensure they are authorized to make changes.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies the caller's identity by asking security questions.

nodes.task_description: Update the billing address in the customer master record.
